_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDER VALUES ONLY - do not bet on these. Copy this file to umpires.json and replace with real home-plate-umpire K tendencies from a trusted source (e.g. Umpire Scorecards, umpscorecards.com). 'k_rate' = strikeouts per plate appearance in that umpire's games (league average is ~0.22); 'called_strike_rate' is optional. Any umpire not listed here is treated as neutral by the model.
